message.content:
Create a dotnet new custom template for the user's LLM-optimized project structure. 

Create the template at: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\templates\llm-winforms\

The template should generate a .NET 9.0 WinForms project with:

1. Feature-based folder structure:
```
ProjectName/
  Features/
    Sample/
      SampleService.cs
      SampleForm.cs (designer-compatible)
      SampleForm.Designer.cs
  Shared/
    Communication/
      SerialPortHelper.cs (basic IDevice implementation)
    Database/
      DbHelper.cs (SQLite basic helper)
    Models/
      IDevice.cs (interface)
  Program.cs (with ThreadException + UnhandledException → crash.log)
  AppConfig.cs (strongly-typed config deserialization)
  config.json (sample settings)
  CLAUDE.md (with File Map section template)
  .gitignore
```

2. Program.cs must include:
- Global exception handler (ThreadException + UnhandledException → crash.log with time/source/message/stack)
- ScottPlot font: ScottPlot.Fonts.Default = "Malgun Gothic" (commented, uncomment if using ScottPlot)

3. Create .template.config/template.json for `dotnet new` registration:
- shortName: "llm-winforms"
- name: "LLM-Optimized WinForms App"
- sourceName: "LlmWinFormsTemplate" (will be replaced by project name)

4. All code comments in English
5. Max 200 lines per file
6. Include a README.md in the template folder (not in the generated project) explaining how to install and use the template

Keep files minimal and practical. This is for industrial automation WinForms apps (.NET 9.0).

content.text: 템플릿 구조를 만들겠습니다. 먼저 디렉토리를 확인합니다.

input.content:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <OutputType>WinExe</OutputType>
    <TargetFramework>net9.0-windows</TargetFramework>
    <UseWindowsForms>true</UseWindowsForms>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Data.Sqlite" Version="9.0.*" />
    <PackageReference Include="System.IO.Ports" Version="9.0.*" />
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="9.0.*" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <None Update="config.json">
      <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory>
    </None>
  </ItemGroup>

</Project>

# LlmWinFormsTemplate

## Overview
.NET 9.0 WinForms app for industrial automation. Feature-based folder structure.

## File Map
| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| Program.cs | Entry point, global exception handlers |
| AppConfig.cs | Strongly-typed config from config.json |
| config.json | Runtime settings |
| Features/Sample/SampleForm.cs | Sample form (replace with main feature) |
| Features/Sample/SampleService.cs | Sample business logic |
| Shared/Models/IDevice.cs | Device communication interface |
| Shared/Communication/SerialPortHelper.cs | Serial port IDevice impl |
| Shared/Database/DbHelper.cs | SQLite helper |

## Conventions
- Feature folder: each feature gets its own folder under Features/
- Form + Service pattern: forms handle UI, services handle logic
- Max 200 lines per file
- Global exception handler writes to crash.log

## Adding a New Feature
1. Create folder: Features/YourFeature/
2. Add YourFeatureForm.cs + .Designer.cs + YourFeatureService.cs
3. Update this File Map

## .NET
bin/
obj/
*.user
*.suo
*.vs/

## Build
publish/

## Runtime
crash.log
*.db

## IDE
.idea/
*.DotSettings.user

## OS
Thumbs.db
Desktop.ini
.DS_Store

content.text: 이제 README.md를 템플릿 폴더(프로젝트 바깥)에 생성합니다.

input.content:
# LLM-Optimized WinForms Template

A `dotnet new` custom template for .NET 9.0 WinForms industrial automation apps.
Feature-based folder structure with global crash logging, serial port helper, and SQLite support.

## Install

```bash
dotnet new install "C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\templates\llm-winforms\LlmWinFormsTemplate"
```

## Usage

```bash
dotnet new llm-winforms -n MyProject
cd MyProject
dotnet run
```

The `sourceName` "LlmWinFormsTemplate" is replaced by your project name (`-n` value) in all namespaces, filenames, and config.

## Uninstall

```bash
dotnet new uninstall "C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\templates\llm-winforms\LlmWinFormsTemplate"
```

## What's Included

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| Program.cs | Entry point with ThreadException + UnhandledException → crash.log |
| AppConfig.cs | Strongly-typed JSON config |
| Features/Sample/ | Example feature with Form + Service pattern |
| Shared/Models/IDevice.cs | Device communication interface |
| Shared/Communication/SerialPortHelper.cs | Serial port IDevice implementation |
| Shared/Database/DbHelper.cs | SQLite helper (Microsoft.Data.Sqlite) |
| CLAUDE.md | Project context file with File Map for LLM agents |

## Adding ScottPlot

1. `dotnet add package ScottPlot.WinForms`
2. Uncomment `ScottPlot.Fonts.Default = "Malgun Gothic";` in Program.cs

content.text:
완료. 생성된 템플릿 요약:

**경로:** `C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\templates\llm-winforms\`

**구조:**
- `LlmWinFormsTemplate/` - 실제 템플릿 소스 (12개 파일)
- `README.md` - 설치/사용 안내

**주요 내용:**
- `dotnet new llm-winforms -n 프로젝트명` 으로 생성 가능 (이미 설치 완료)
- `sourceName: LlmWinFormsTemplate` -> `-n` 값으로 네임스페이스/파일명 자동 치환
- .NET 9.0, WinForms, Microsoft.Data.Sqlite, System.IO.Ports 포함
- Program.cs: ThreadException + UnhandledException -> crash.log, ScottPlot 폰트 설정 (주석)
- Feature 폴더 패턴: Features/Sample/ (Form + Service)
- Shared/: IDevice 인터페이스, SerialPortHelper, DbHelper
- CLAUDE.md: File Map 섹션 포함
- 빌드 확인 완료 (0 errors, 0 warnings)
